features: RETIMAX 1500: Gentle, Vitamin A-Rich Skincare with 1500 IU/g Retinyl Palmitate. Infused with a stable form of vitamin A, this cream helps support your skin's natural appearance and texture, suitable for daily use on dry or delicate skin.

MOISTURISING: Deep Moisture for Dry, Sensitive or Stressed Skin. A rich, fragrance-free cream designed to nourish and soften dry, flaky or dehydrated skin - ideal for sensitive complexions that need extra care.

HYDRATING: Comforting Hydration After Sun or Environmental Exposure Helps maintain skin comfort and hydration after time in the sun, cold weather, or indoor heating/air conditioning, without added preservatives or fragrances.

GREAT SKIN: Smooth-Looking Skin Without Harsh Actives. With a creamy texture and no exfoliants, this formula supports a softer, more refined look - perfect for those who prefer a gentle skincare approach.
LONG-LASTING: A Little Goes a Long Way. The thick, emollient texture spreads easily - just a small amount is needed per application, making it a great-value essential in your daily skincare routine.
